status: DEPLOYED + LIVE-VERIFIED (general AND religious/classical content). 100% free stack.
what_shipped: 1. General extraction mode: GENERAL_EXTRACTION_SYSTEM prompt + mode routing (selectExtractionSystem/deriveExtractionMode); default flipped math->general, math opt-in via extraction_mode=math / cls=mathematical.
2. parseExtractionOutput general branch normalizes {label,content,type} into the math candidate shape (type->kind, confidence default high). Schema-free (m8_graph_nodes has no type column).
3. extraction_mode wired end-to-end incl. orchestrator.js:1436 (per explicit instruction).

4. FIX (silent 0-extraction): parseJsonArrayLoose salvages prose-wrapped/fenced JSON arrays that a strict JSON.parse was discarding; extractConceptsWithStatus returns a debug reason; buildKnowledgeIngestContext surfaces it; maxOutputTokens 1200->2048.

5. OPTION 3 (religious/classical reliability): EXTRACT_PROVIDER_ORDER = groq,cerebras,gemini,gemini2,openrouter,mistral (env M8_EXTRACT_PROVIDER_ORDER override, NO paid providers) passed as providerOrder to extraction. Gemini RECITATION-blocks famous religious text, so extraction now tries groq/cerebras FIRST.

live_verification.religious_classical: user's البداية والنهاية paste (source_id 25): 0 (pre-option-3) -> 10 real nodes (post-option-3): Quranic verse, Heraclius<->Abu Sufyan, Prophet's names, al-Bayhaqi, lineage عبد الله/عبد المطلب, al-Zuhri
live_verification.diagnosis_note: 0-extractions were (a) strict JSON.parse discarding fallback-provider output [fixed by #4], and (b) Gemini RECITATION on famous religious text + rate-limited free fallbacks [fixed by #5]. Vercel logs are blind to extraction internals; the debug field is the visibility channel.

deploy: DEPLOYED to production (main b3cb084). All on the free stack.
known_followups_minor: Chat narration: an Arabic-ONLY ingest paste can make the model ignore the packet directive and reply oddly even though nodes ARE created. Cosmetic; did not affect real usage. Robust fix = deterministic hard-return for ingest (sacrifices model narration of the clarification summary) — deliberately NOT done.
Free-provider per-minute rate limits: ingest a book at a time, not many in 2 minutes. Book path is chapter-paced + resumable.
